sessions_sample.raw: Easy Run:   3 km at a comfortable pace (zone 2/3).
Tempo/Interval Run:   3 km (Within the run, include: 45 second faster reps with 1–2 minutes light jog recovery in between). Aim to spread these out as evenly as you can throughout the run (zone 3/4).
sessions_sample.parsing_note: The inclusion of specific interval instructions may complicate parsing for session role.

sessions_sample.raw: Strength Training:   Bodyweight exercises (e.g., squats, lunges, planks, glute bridges, push press – 2 sets of 10–12 reps each).
sessions_sample.parsing_note: Strength training sessions include specific exercises and rep counts which may not fit standard session parsing.

sessions_sample.raw: Long Run:   3 km at an easy, conversational pace (zone 2/3).
Long Run:   10K (or your 10K event day – mai
sessions_sample.parsing_note: The text is cut off, which may lead to incomplete parsing of the session.

unhandled_patterns.issue: The parser may not recognize heart rate zones as relevant information for intensity.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Include heart rate zone descriptions as part of intensity parsing.

unhandled_patterns.pattern: e.g., squats, lunges, planks, glute bridges, push press
unhandled_patterns.issue: The parser may not handle lists of exercises within strength training sessions.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Allow for lists of exercises in strength training sessions and parse them as an array.

prompt_improvements: Recognize and parse heart rate zones (e.g., Zone 2/3) as part of intensity.
Allow for lists of exercises in strength training sessions and parse them as an array.
anomalies: The plan includes a mix of running and strength training sessions with specific instructions that may not fit standard session formats.
